description_long: This frying pan features a round, shallow cooking surface with gently sloped sides and a slightly textured, matte finish. The pan is primarily dark gray, likely made of cast iron or nonstick-coated metal, and has a robust, solid appearance. Its handle is long, straight, and rectangular, attached securely to the pan's body, and appears to be made of a different, possibly heat-resistant material, such as plastic or silicone. The rim of the pan is moderately thick and straight, with no visible pouring spouts or flared edges. There is no visible hanging hole or loop at the end of the handle, and the bottom of the pan appears smooth without any distinct patterns or brand markings. The overall design is utilitarian and functional, suitable for everyday cooking tasks.
description: A dark gray, round frying pan with a straight, solid handle and a smooth, matte finish. The pan has a simple, functional design with no visible brand markings or hanging hole.
description_view_0: Side view showing the pan's shallow depth, round shape, and the full length of the straight handle.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular opening of the pan and the rectangular handle extending directly outward.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the pan's profile and handle attachment.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the full round cooking surface and the handle extending from the rim.
attribute_handle_type: Single, straight, rectangular handle made of plastic or heat-resistant material, no visible grip texture or ergonomic shaping.
attribute_rim_design: Moderately thick, straight rim with no flaring, pouring spouts, or reinforced edges.
attribute_bottom_pattern: Smooth bottom surface with no visible patterns, ridges, or brand stamps.
